name: LightEdge

when_to_use: Managed edge computing with compliance-focused private cloud
Regulated industry data hosting with HIPAA and PCI compliance
Hybrid cloud with on-prem connectivity for enterprise workloads
Disaster recovery and colocation for US regional enterprises
Managed services for healthcare and financial sector clients

review.verdict: Compliance-heavy managed cloud for regulated workloads, not a self-service developer platform.
review.best_for: Regulated US industries needing compliance-focused private cloud with managed support
review.not_for: Developer-led teams, startups, or anyone wanting self-service provisioning

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
